gist.headline: Alara AI takes root
gist.blurb: A new seedling in the community greenhouse. Alara AI wires up Flux, LTX-2, and Gemini into one neat package.
gist.summary: Added Alara AI to the community app showcase, highlighting its integration of image, video, and chat generation.
gist.impact: The community can now explore Alara AI in the greenhouse as a reference for building multi-modal applications.
gist.visual_concept: The community greenhouse. Polly the bee tending to a new plant that represents Alara AI's multi-modal features (images, video, chat).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a glowing new code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) pot inside a lush digital greenhouse. The plant sprouts tiny pixelated polaroids, film strips, and chat bubbles. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy 8-bit aesthetic, chunky retro sprites, emotionally warm.
